## Change

Describe the operational problem and the implemented behavior.

## Validation

- [ ] `./build.ps1 -Task Verify -Bootstrap` passes.
- [ ] Tests cover threshold boundaries and failure behavior.
- [ ] Public help and documentation match the implementation.
- [ ] The change remains read-only.
- [ ] Samples and fixtures contain no production or customer data.

## Compatibility

State the tested PowerShell editions, operating systems, execution modes, and any known limitations.

## Security impact

Describe changes to permissions, remoting, data collection, report content, or dependency risk. Write `None` when not applicable.
